title: Amount of liability may be stipulated
doc_html:
§197.  Amount of liability may be stipulated

The sureties on all bonds given by all public officers may stipulate the amount for which they will severally become liable.  This Section does not apply to sureties on the bonds of the State Treasurer and the State Auditor.
